original: You can’t use this module on something without shields!
For some reason, "+t.getCombatName()+" tries to hack shields that no longer exist. What a waste!
Visible ripples in space appear around "+e.getCombatName()+" as your shield disruptor tricks your foe’s shield into tearing itself apart!
Your view ripples and shudders as your shield tears itself apart at the behest of "+t.getCombatName()+"!
h.m.possessive(e.capitalA+e.short)+" shield ripples and tears itself apart at the behest of "+h.m.possessive(t.getCombatName())+" shield disruptor!
Despite your best efforts, the shield disruptor can’t seem to sabotage "+h.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" systems.
Despite "+h.m.possessive(t.getCombatName())+" best efforts, your systems are too robust to be sabotaged by a shield disruptor.
Despite "+h.m.possessive(t.getCombatName())+" best efforts, "+h.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" systems are too robust to be sabotaged by a shield disruptor.
